hero.title: AI Engineer
hero.subtitle: Building intelligent systems that bridge research and real-world impact.

about.title: About Me
about.body: I'm a first-year AI Engineering student at Institut Teknologi Sepuluh Nopember (ITS) Surabaya with a GPA of 3.4/4.0. I work at the intersection of research and engineering — building systems that use machine intelligence to solve real problems. From award-winning bio-acoustic TB detection to WhatsApp-based financial AI for SMEs, I thrive on projects where the stakes are real.
about.degree: Bachelor of Science in Artificial Intelligence Engineering

contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.subtitle: Open to research collaborations, AI projects, and freelance engagements.
